# Confidence and evidence
confidence: high
free_text_summary: |
  The email domain pasteur.fr belongs to the Institut Pasteur, a major French biomedical research institute, and not directly to TheraVectys. However, there is a prominent, well-documented structural link between the two organizations. TheraVectys is an immunotherapy company that spun off from the Institut Pasteur in 2005. Furthermore, they jointly operate the Institut Pasteur-TheraVectys Joint Laboratory. This deep, formal partnership explains why an individual researching or working for TheraVectys would legitimately possess and use an @pasteur.fr email address.
